topics.title: Car Buttons
topics.content: Common car buttons include the hazard button, lock button, window controls, windshield wiper controls, and climate controls.

quiz.question: What does the hazard light button do?
quiz.answer: It turns on all signal lights to warn other drivers.
quiz.hint: It is used to alert other drivers that your car may be stopped or in trouble.

topics.title: Dashboard Warning Lights
topics.content: Dashboard warning lights tell you about issues such as low oil pressure, tire pressure, battery or charging problems, and engine problems.

quiz.question: What does the battery warning light usually suggest?
quiz.answer: It usually suggests a charging system problem.
quiz.hint: It does not always mean the battery itself is dead. Think about the system that keeps the battery charged.

topics.title: Basic Maintenance
topics.content: Basic maintenance includes checking oil, tire pressure, coolant, windshield washer fluid, and battery condition.

quiz.question: Name one thing you should check regularly as part of basic car maintenance.
quiz.answer: Examples include oil, tire pressure, coolant, washer fluid, or battery condition.
quiz.hint: Think about fluids or tire condition.
